data.content: Plan review found the decomposition directionally correct but not implementation-ready. Child c8f4 leaves canonical output target naming unresolved and proposes warning-only validation, which does not satisfy the required validated target set. Child 0d93 does not actually switch prompt rendering to resolved runtime StepMetadata and omits shipment_review from output-conditional prompt updates. Child 9727 therefore bakes the unresolved validation/rendering contract into tests. Please revise the plan around a single canonical runtime target vocabulary, explicit legacy normalization from existing remote_main/OutputMode forms, a StepMetadata-driven prompt rendering path for all output-conditional prompts, and tests that match that final contract.
